title: Post-057 Parallel Work Readiness Reassessment
objective: Reassess whether Olares Phase 5 evidence after Packet 057 supports opening a narrow parallel-work planning pilot, while keeping actual parallel execution, Olares-first daily development migration, package/toolchain repair, runtime/service mutation, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, remote rewrite, rollback, and old-clone mutation separate.
dependency_note: Packet 057 restored publication hygiene for the validated Packet 053 source artifact and left `/home/olares/code/apex` clean at commit `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c`.
required_inputs: Prior bounded host source/test trial evidence from Packets 031/035, 040/044, and 053/057
Known blockers: moved remote notice, host no-install validation gap, old-clone preservation, and authority-publication cadence
constrained_outputs: A readiness handoff answering whether Phase 5 supports no parallel work, parallel planning only, or a narrow parallel execution pilot
If a next packet is selected, exactly one packet candidate with scope, no-go items, and required guardrails

No source edits, no host mutation, no publication, no package or lockfile mutation, no install, no runtime or service mutation, no remote rewrite, no AI-services expansion, no Gitea/code-hosting transition, no canonical-hosting transition, no migration approval, no rollback, no force/reset/clean, and no old-clone mutation
validation_steps: Confirm Packet 057 publication and host clean-parity evidence.
Review accumulated bounded trial evidence and distinguish serial source/test readiness from parallel execution readiness.
Identify blockers and guardrails required before any parallel host-side source/test work.
Select one truthful next packet candidate, if any, without approving migration or actual parallel execution by implication.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes no database writes and no source edits, host mutation, publication, package mutation, lockfile mutation, install, runtime mutation, service mutation, remote rewrite, AI-services expansion, Gitea/code-hosting transition, canonical-hosting transition, migration approval, rollback, force/reset/clean, or old-clone mutation.
execution_summary: Confirmed Packet 057 restored publication hygiene for the third bounded validated source/test artifact at commit `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c`.
Confirmed `/home/olares/code/apex` was clean at `d8e5f02fb0ea1b73cc573c855ea3d5562aa2314c` after Packet 057.
Assessed accumulated source/test trial evidence from the Packet 031/035, Packet 040/044, and Packet 053/057 cycles.
Determined Phase 5 now supports a narrow parallel-work planning pilot, but not actual parallel source/test execution yet.

Identified required guardrails before actual parallel work: disjoint file ownership, one coordinator-owned publication lane, host/workstation source-of-truth rules, validation command matrix, conflict handling, and authority-publication sequencing.

Did not edit source, mutate host state, publish, install dependencies, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, rewrite remotes, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, approve migration, roll back, force/reset/clean, or mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
closure_note: Packet 058 completed as a readiness reassessment. It concludes that Phase 5 is ready to plan a narrow parallel-work pilot, but actual parallel host-side source/test execution remains not ready until guardrails are authored and published.
next_action: Execute Packet 059 as bounded parallel-work governance and disjoint-scope planning only. Do not execute parallel source/test work, approve migration, mutate host state, publish, install, mutate packages or lockfiles, mutate runtime or services, rewrite remotes, expand AI-services, change Gitea/code-hosting, change canonical-hosting, roll back, force/reset/clean, or mutate `/home/olares/src/apex-power-ops-platform`.
